name: Pecan Tart with Praline Cream
recipeIngredient: 9 to 10 inch tart or pie pastry
recipeInstructions:
1. Make a 9-10 inch pie pastry and place it in a pie or tart pan. Set aside.
2. In a microwave-safe bowl, combine melted margarine, sugar, and corn syrup. Stir until the sugar is dissolved. Allow to cool slightly.
3. Add eggs, vanilla, and salt. Stir well.
4. Pour the filling into the crust.
5. Arrange pecan halves on top of the filling.
6. Bake at 325°F for 50-55 minutes.
7. Place chocolate chips in a freezer-safe zip-lock bag.
8. Submerge the bag in boiling water to melt the chocolate chips.
9. Snip one corner from the bag and drizzle over the top of the pie.
10. In a separate bowl, combine whipped cream, 1/2 teaspoon vanilla, and praline liqueur. Beat until foamy.
11. Add confectioner's sugar. Beat until soft peaks form.
12. Serve on individual dessert plates with cream under the pie.
